metadata.description: Public Claude Code marketplace for the Laioutr platform. Plugins target external developers, designers, and content authors building on Laioutr (Vue 3 / Nuxt 3, UI components, Orchestr data integrations).

plugins.name: laioutr-developer
plugins.description: Workflows, rules, and the docs MCP for developers building on the Laioutr e-commerce platform.
